title: Neomammillaria lasiacantha
taxonomy: Neomammillaria lasiacantha is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a type of mammillaria, a subgenus of Mammillaria. Mammillaria is a genus of small cacti that belong to the family Cactaceae. The classification of Neomammillaria lasiacantha is further divided into the subgenus Mammillaria and the section Mammillaria.
